subcategory: 3D WebGL interactive background with Three.js scene
use_cases: Landing pages with immersive 3D hero sections
SaaS product showcases with interactive backgrounds
Portfolio or creative agency hero sections
Tech startup landing pages with premium 3D effects
E-commerce brand showcases with engaging visuals
ai_summary: An advanced interactive hero component powered by Three.js WebGL rendering featuring 3D scenes with instanced meshes, physical materials, raycasting for mouse interaction, and ambient lighting via RoomEnvironment. Includes navigation elements, theme toggling (light/dark), and a sophisticated animation loop with resize handling. Best suited for premium landing pages and SaaS product showcases requiring immersive visual experiences.
